---
title: "Base Rの作図"
# Purpose: Teach simple Base R plotting for plant growth data.
---

{{< include ../_extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}

Base Rの作図関数は、データを素早く確認したいときに便利です。
ここでは `plot()`、`hist()`、`boxplot()`、`barplot()` を使います。

## 散布図

```{webr}
#| autorun: true
plants <- read.csv("data/plant_growth.csv")

treatment_id <- as.integer(factor(plants$treatment))

plot(
  plants$day,
  plants$height_cm,
  pch = 19,
  col = treatment_id,
  xlab = "Day",
  ylab = "Height (cm)",
  main = "Plant height through time"
)
legend(
  "topleft",
  legend = levels(factor(plants$treatment)),
  col = seq_along(levels(factor(plants$treatment))),
  pch = 19,
  bty = "n"
)
```

## ヒストグラムと箱ひげ図

```{webr}
plants <- read.csv("data/plant_growth.csv")

hist(
  plants$height_cm,
  xlab = "Height (cm)",
  main = "Height distribution"
)

boxplot(
  height_cm ~ treatment,
  data = plants,
  xlab = "Treatment",
  ylab = "Height (cm)",
  main = "Height by treatment"
)
```

## 棒グラフ

```{webr}
plants <- read.csv("data/plant_growth.csv")

mean_height <- aggregate(height_cm ~ treatment, data = plants, FUN = mean)
barplot(
  mean_height$height_cm,
  names.arg = mean_height$treatment,
  xlab = "Treatment",
  ylab = "Mean height (cm)",
  main = "Mean height by treatment"
)
```

## 点と線を足す

```{webr}
plants <- read.csv("data/plant_growth.csv")

plot(
  plants$day,
  plants$height_cm,
  pch = 19,
  xlab = "Day",
  ylab = "Height (cm)",
  main = "Overall growth trend"
)
points(plants$day, plants$height_cm, pch = 1, col = "gray40")
abline(lm(height_cm ~ day, data = plants), col = "blue", lwd = 2)
```

## 練習

この内容を確認したら、[練習：Base Rの作図](../exercises/11-base-plot-exercise.qmd)に進んでください。
